features: Dove go fresh Body Wash, Cucumber and Green Tea Pump 34 Ounce
description: Product description Dove go fresh Cool Moisture Body Wash gives you softer, smoother skin after just one shower;#1 Dermatologist Recommended;Refreshing cucumber and green tea scent revitalizes your senses;Formula with Nutrium Moisture technology delivers skin natural nutrients;Light, hydrating feel and refreshing formula that effectively nourishes skin Ingredients Water (Aqua), Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Lauroyl Glycinate, Sodium Lauroyl Isethionate, Acrylates Copolymer, Lauric Acid, Glycerin, Fragrance (Parfum), Stearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Cucumis Sativus (Cucumber) Juice, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, Phenoxyethanol, Glycol Distearate, BHT, Tetrasodium EDTA, PEG-150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, PPG-2 Hydroxyethyl Cocamide, Iodopropynyl Butylcarbamate, Citric Acid, Linalool, Limonene, Hexyl Cinnamal, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Yellow 5 (CI 19140), Blue 1 (CI 42090).
